scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const copyDir = (src, dest) => { if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(file => { const s = path.join(src, file); const d = path.join(dest, file); if (fs.lstatSync(s).isDirectory()) copyDir(s, d); else fs.copyFileSync(s, d); }); }; copyDir('src/clauses', 'dist/clauses'); copyDir('src/fixtures', 'dist/fixtures');"
